required_tables.commit: Validation rules for KFD region entries
required_tables.name: regions

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_kfd_page_fault' appears in category in regions table
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_kfd_page_fault' category entries not found in regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_kfd_page_fault';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_kfd_page_migrate' appears in category in regions table
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_kfd_page_migrate' category entries not found in regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_kfd_page_migrate';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_kfd_event_unmap_from_gpu' appears in category in regions table
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_kfd_event_unmap_from_gpu' category entries not found in regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_kfd_event_unmap_from_gpu';

validation_queries.description: Check for any NULL values in the 'name' column for KFD regions
validation_queries.error_message: NULL entries found in the name column of KFD regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category LIKE 'rocm_kfd_%' AND name IS NULL;

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_kfd_page_fault' string is present
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_kfd_page_fault' string not found in rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string WHERE string = 'rocm_kfd_page_fault';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_kfd_page_migrate' string is present
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_kfd_page_migrate' string not found in rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string WHERE string = 'rocm_kfd_page_migrate';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_kfd_queue' string is present
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_kfd_queue' string not found in rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string WHERE string = 'rocm_kfd_queue';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_kfd_event_unmap_from_gpu' string is present
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_kfd_event_unmap_from_gpu' string not found in rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string WHERE string = 'rocm_kfd_event_unmap_from_gpu';

validation_queries.description: Verify that KFD page fault events have 'address' argument
validation_queries.error_message: No 'address' argument found for kfd_page_fault events
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM events_args WHERE category = 'rocm_kfd_page_fault' AND arg_name = 'address';

validation_queries.description: Verify that KFD page migrate events have 'src_agent' argument
validation_queries.error_message: No 'src_agent' argument found for kfd_page_migrate events
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM events_args WHERE category = 'rocm_kfd_page_migrate' AND arg_name = 'src_agent';

validation_queries.description: Verify that KFD page migrate events have 'dst_agent' argument
validation_queries.error_message: No 'dst_agent' argument found for kfd_page_migrate events
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM events_args WHERE category = 'rocm_kfd_page_migrate' AND arg_name = 'dst_agent';

validation_queries.description: If kfd_queue events exist, verify 'agent' argument is present
validation_queries.error_message: kfd_queue events exist but 'agent' argument is missing in events_args
validation_queries.query: SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_kfd_queue') = 0 THEN 1 ELSE CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events_args WHERE category = 'rocm_kfd_queue' AND arg_name = 'agent') > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END as count;

validation_queries.description: Verify that KFD unmap events have 'start_address' argument
validation_queries.error_message: No 'start_address' argument found for kfd_event_unmap_from_gpu events
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM events_args WHERE category = 'rocm_kfd_event_unmap_from_gpu' AND arg_name = 'start_address';

validation_queries.description: Verify that KFD unmap events have 'end_address' argument
validation_queries.error_message: No 'end_address' argument found for kfd_event_unmap_from_gpu events
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM events_args WHERE category = 'rocm_kfd_event_unmap_from_gpu' AND arg_name = 'end_address';

required_tables.commit: Validation rules for KFD PMC info descriptors

validation_queries.description: Check that KFD page fault PMC descriptor exists
validation_queries.error_message: No PMC descriptor found for 'rocm_kfd_page_fault'
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE name = 'rocm_kfd_page_fault'

validation_queries.description: Check that KFD page migrate PMC descriptor exists
validation_queries.error_message: No PMC descriptor found for 'rocm_kfd_page_migrate'
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE name = 'rocm_kfd_page_migrate'

validation_queries.description: Check that KFD queue PMC descriptor exists
validation_queries.error_message: No PMC descriptor found for 'rocm_kfd_queue'
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE name = 'rocm_kfd_queue'

validation_queries.description: Check that KFD unmap from GPU PMC descriptor exists
validation_queries.error_message: No PMC descriptor found for 'rocm_kfd_event_unmap_from_gpu'
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE name = 'rocm_kfd_event_unmap_from_gpu'

validation_queries.description: Check that KFD PMC descriptors have block set to 'KFD'
validation_queries.error_message: KFD PMC descriptors with block='KFD' not found
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE block = 'KFD'

required_tables.commit: Validation rules for KFD PMC event values

validation_queries.description: Check for KFD page fault PMC event samples
validation_queries.error_message: No PMC event samples found for 'rocm_kfd_page_fault'
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name = 'rocm_kfd_page_fault'

validation_queries.description: Check for KFD page migrate PMC event samples
validation_queries.error_message: No PMC event samples found for 'rocm_kfd_page_migrate'
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name = 'rocm_kfd_page_migrate'

validation_queries.description: If kfd_queue regions exist, verify PMC event samples exist
validation_queries.error_message: kfd_queue events exist but no corresponding PMC event samples found
validation_queries.query: SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_kfd_queue') = 0 THEN 1 ELSE CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name = 'rocm_kfd_queue') > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END as count

validation_queries.description: Check for KFD unmap from GPU PMC event samples
validation_queries.error_message: No PMC event samples found for 'rocm_kfd_event_unmap_from_gpu'
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name = 'rocm_kfd_event_unmap_from_gpu'
